verses.esv: That which was from the beginning, which we have heard, which we have seen with our eyes, which we looked upon and have touched with our hands, concerning the word of life—
verses.kjv: THAT which was from the beginning, which we have heard, which we have seen with our eyes, which we have looked upon, and our hands have handled, of the Word of life;
verses.bsb: That which was from the beginning, which we have heard, which we have seen with our own eyes, which we have gazed upon and touched with our own hands—this is the Word of life.

verses.esv: the life was made manifest, and we have seen it, and testify to it and proclaim to you the eternal life, which was with the Father and was made manifest to us—
verses.kjv: (For the life was manifested, and we have seen it, and bear witness, and shew unto you that eternal life, which was with the Father, and was manifested unto us;)
verses.bsb: And this is the life that was revealed; we have seen it and testified to it, and we proclaim to you the eternal life that was with the Father and was revealed to us.

verses.esv: that which we have seen and heard we proclaim also to you, so that you too may have fellowship with us; and indeed our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
verses.kjv: That which we have seen and heard declare we unto you, that ye also may have fellowship with us: and truly our fellowship is with the Father, and with his Son Jesus Christ.
verses.bsb: We proclaim to you what we have seen and heard, so that you also may have fellowship with us. And this fellowship of ours is with the Father and with His Son, Jesus Christ.

verses.esv: And we are writing these things so that our joy may be complete.
verses.kjv: And these things write we unto you, that your joy may be full.
verses.bsb: We write these things so that our joy may be complete.

verses.esv: This is the message we have heard from him and proclaim to you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.
verses.kjv: This then is the message which we have heard of him, and declare unto you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.
verses.bsb: And this is the message we have heard from Him and announce to you: God is light, and in Him there is no darkness at all.

verses.esv: If we say we have fellowship with him while we walk in darkness, we lie and do not practice the truth.
verses.kjv: If we say that we have fellowship with him, and walk in darkness, we lie, and do not the truth:
verses.bsb: If we say we have fellowship with Him yet walk in the darkness, we lie and do not practice the truth.

verses.esv: But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus his Son cleanses us from all sin.
verses.kjv: But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanseth us from all sin.
verses.bsb: But if we walk in the light as He is in the light, we have fellowship with one another, and the blood of Jesus His Son cleanses us from all sin.

verses.esv: If we say we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.
verses.kjv: If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.
verses.bsb: If we say we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.

verses.esv: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
verses.kjv: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
verses.bsb: If we confess our sins, He is faithful and just to forgive us our sins and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.

verses.esv: If we say we have not sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.
verses.kjv: If we say that we have not sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.
verses.bsb: If we say we have not sinned, we make Him out to be a liar, and His word is not in us.

verses.esv: My little children, I am writing these things to you so that you may not sin. But if anyone does sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous.
verses.kjv: MY little children, these things write I unto you, that ye sin not. And if any man sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous:
verses.bsb: My little children, I am writing these things to you so that you will not sin. But if anyone does sin, we have an advocate before the Father—Jesus Christ, the Righteous One.

verses.esv: He is the propitiation for our sins, and not for ours only but also for the sins of the whole world.
verses.kjv: And he is the propitiation for our sins: and not for ours only, but also for the sins of the whole world.
verses.bsb: He Himself is the atoning sacrifice for our sins, and not only for ours but also for the sins of the whole world.

verses.esv: And by this we know that we have come to know him, if we keep his commandments.
verses.kjv: And hereby we do know that we know him, if we keep his commandments.
verses.bsb: By this we can be sure that we have come to know Him: if we keep His commandments.

verses.esv: Whoever says “I know him” but does not keep his commandments is a liar, and the truth is not in him,
verses.kjv: He that saith, I know him, and keepeth not his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in him.
verses.bsb: If anyone says, “I know Him,” but does not keep His commandments, he is a liar, and the truth is not in him.

verses.esv: but whoever keeps his word, in him truly the love of God is perfected. By this we may know that we are in him:
verses.kjv: But whoso keepeth his word, in him verily is the love of God perfected: hereby know we that we are in him.
verses.bsb: But if anyone keeps His word, the love of God has been truly perfected in him. By this we know that we are in Him:

verses.esv: whoever says he abides in him ought to walk in the same way in which he walked.
verses.kjv: He that saith he abideth in him ought himself also so to walk, even as he walked.
verses.bsb: Whoever claims to abide in Him must walk as Jesus walked.

verses.esv: Beloved, I am writing you no new commandment, but an old commandment that you had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word that you have heard.
verses.kjv: Brethren, I write no new commandment unto you, but an old commandment which ye had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word which ye have heard from the beginning.
verses.bsb: Beloved, I am not writing to you a new commandment, but an old one, which you have had from the beginning. This commandment is the message you have heard.

verses.esv: At the same time, it is a new commandment that I am writing to you, which is true in him and in you, because the darkness is passing away and the true light is already shining.
verses.kjv: Again, a new commandment I write unto you, which thing is true in him and in you: because the darkness is past, and the true light now shineth.
verses.bsb: Then again, I am also writing to you a new commandment, which is true in Him and also in you. For the darkness is fading and the true light is already shining.

verses.esv: Whoever says he is in the light and hates his brother is still in darkness.
verses.kjv: He that saith he is in the light, and hateth his brother, is in darkness even until now.
verses.bsb: If anyone claims to be in the light but hates his brother, he is still in the darkness.

verses.esv: Whoever loves his brother abides in the light, and in him there is no cause for stumbling.
verses.kjv: He that loveth his brother abideth in the light, and there is none occasion of stumbling in him.
verses.bsb: Whoever loves his brother remains in the light, and there is no cause of stumbling in him.

verses.esv: But whoever hates his brother is in the darkness and walks in the darkness, and does not know where he is going, because the darkness has blinded his eyes.
verses.kjv: But he that hateth his brother is in darkness, and walketh in darkness, and knoweth not whither he goeth, because that darkness hath blinded his eyes.
verses.bsb: But whoever hates his brother is in the darkness and walks in the darkness. He does not know where he is going, because the darkness has blinded his eyes.

verses.esv: I am writing to you, little children, because your sins are forgiven for his name's sake.
verses.kjv: I write unto you, little children, because your sins are forgiven you for his name’s sake.
verses.bsb: I am writing to you, little children, because your sins have been forgiven through His name.

verses.esv: I am writing to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I am writing to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one. I write to you, children, because you know the Father.
verses.kjv: I write unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I write unto you, young men, because ye have overcome the wicked one. I write unto you, little children, because ye have known the Father.
verses.bsb: I am writing to you, fathers, because you know Him who is from the beginning.  I am writing to you, young men, because you have overcome the evil one.  I have written to you, children, because you know the Father.

verses.esv: I write to you, fathers, because you know him who is from the beginning. I write to you, young men, because you are strong, and the word of God abides in you, and you have overcome the evil one.
verses.kjv: I have written unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I have written unto you, young men, because ye are strong, and the word of God abideth in you, and ye have overcome the wicked one.
verses.bsb: I have written to you, fathers, because you know Him who is from the beginning.  I have written to you, young men, because you are strong, and the word of God abides in you, and you have overcome the evil one.

verses.esv: Do not love the world or the things in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in him.
verses.kjv: Love not the world, neither the things that are in the world. If any man love the world, the love of the Father is not in him.
verses.bsb: Do not love the world or anything in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in him.

verses.esv: For all that is in the world—the desires of the flesh and the desires of the eyes and pride of life—is not from the Father but is from the world.
verses.kjv: For all that is in the world, the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the world.
verses.bsb: For all that is in the world—the desires of the flesh, the desires of the eyes, and the pride of life—is not from the Father but from the world.

verses.esv: And the world is passing away along with its desires, but whoever does the will of God abides forever.
verses.kjv: And the world passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of God abideth for ever.
verses.bsb: The world is passing away, along with its desires; but whoever does the will of God remains forever.

verses.esv: Children, it is the last hour, and as you have heard that antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have come. Therefore we know that it is the last hour.
verses.kjv: Little children, it is the last time: and as ye have heard that antichrist shall come, even now are there many antichrists; whereby we know that it is the last time.
verses.bsb: Children, it is the last hour; and just as you have heard that the antichrist is coming, so now many antichrists have appeared. This is how we know it is the last hour.

verses.esv: They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would have continued with us. But they went out, that it might become plain that they all are not of us.
verses.kjv: They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would no doubt have continued with us: but they went out, that they might be made manifest that they were not all of us.
verses.bsb: They went out from us, but they did not belong to us. For if they had belonged to us, they would have remained with us. But their departure made it clear that none of them belonged to us.

verses.esv: But you have been anointed by the Holy One, and you all have knowledge.
verses.kjv: But ye have an unction from the Holy One, and ye know all things.
verses.bsb: You, however, have an anointing from the Holy One, and all of you know the truth.

verses.esv: I write to you, not because you do not know the truth, but because you know it, and because no lie is of the truth.
verses.kjv: I have not written unto you because ye know not the truth, but because ye know it, and that no lie is of the truth.
verses.bsb: I have not written to you because you lack knowledge of the truth, but because you have it, and because no lie comes from the truth.

verses.esv: Who is the liar but he who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This is the antichrist, he who denies the Father and the Son.
verses.kjv: Who is a liar but he that denieth that Jesus is the Christ? He is antichrist, that denieth the Father and the Son.
verses.bsb: Who is the liar, if it is not the one who denies that Jesus is the Christ? This is the antichrist, who denies the Father and the Son.

verses.esv: No one who denies the Son has the Father. Whoever confesses the Son has the Father also.
verses.kjv: Whosoever denieth the Son, the same hath not the Father: [but] he that acknowledgeth the Son hath the Father also.
verses.bsb: Whoever denies the Son does not have the Father, but whoever confesses the Son has the Father as well.

verses.esv: Let what you heard from the beginning abide in you. If what you heard from the beginning abides in you, then you too will abide in the Son and in the Father.
verses.kjv: Let that therefore abide in you, which ye have heard from the beginning. If that which ye have heard from the beginning shall remain in you, ye also shall continue in the Son, and in the Father.
verses.bsb: As for you, let what you have heard from the beginning remain in you. If it does, you will also remain in the Son and in the Father.

verses.esv: And this is the promise that he made to us—eternal life.
verses.kjv: And this is the promise that he hath promised us, even eternal life.
verses.bsb: And this is the promise that He Himself made to us: eternal life.

verses.esv: I write these things to you about those who are trying to deceive you.
verses.kjv: These things have I written unto you concerning them that seduce you.
verses.bsb: I have written these things to you about those who are trying to deceive you.

verses.esv: But the anointing that you received from him abides in you, and you have no need that anyone should teach you. But as his anointing teaches you about everything, and is true, and is no lie—just as it has taught you, abide in him.
verses.kjv: But the anointing which ye have received of him abideth in you, and ye need not that any man teach you: but as the same anointing teacheth you of all things, and is truth, and is no lie, and even as it hath taught you, ye shall abide in him.
verses.bsb: And as for you, the anointing you received from Him remains in you, and you do not need anyone to teach you. But just as His true and genuine anointing teaches you about all things, so remain in Him as you have been taught.

verses.esv: And now, little children, abide in him, so that when he appears we may have confidence and not shrink from him in shame at his coming.
verses.kjv: And now, little children, abide in him; that, when he shall appear, we may have confidence, and not be ashamed before him at his coming.
verses.bsb: And now, little children, remain in Christ, so that when He appears, we may be confident and unashamed before Him at His coming.

verses.esv: If you know that he is righteous, you may be sure that everyone who practices righteousness has been born of him.
verses.kjv: If ye know that he is righteous, ye know that every one that doeth righteousness is born of him.
verses.bsb: If you know that He is righteous, you also know that everyone who practices righteousness has been born of Him.

verses.esv: See what kind of love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of God; and so we are. The reason why the world does not know us is that it did not know him.
verses.kjv: BEHOLD, what manner of love the Father hath bestowed upon us, that we should be called the sons of God: therefore the world knoweth us not, because it knew him not.
verses.bsb: Behold what manner of love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of God. And that is what we are! The reason the world does not know us is that it did not know Him.

verses.esv: Beloved, we are God's children now, and what we will be has not yet appeared; but we know that when he appears we shall be like him, because we shall see him as he is.
verses.kjv: Beloved, now are we the sons of God, and it doth not yet appear what we shall be: but we know that, when he shall appear, we shall be like him; for we shall see him as he is.
verses.bsb: Beloved, we are now children of God, and what we will be has not yet been revealed. We know that when Christ appears, we will be like Him, for we will see Him as He is.

verses.esv: And everyone who thus hopes in him purifies himself as he is pure.
verses.kjv: And every man that hath this hope in him purifieth himself, even as he is pure.
verses.bsb: And everyone who has this hope in Him purifies himself, just as Christ is pure.

verses.esv: Everyone who makes a practice of sinning also practices lawlessness; sin is lawlessness.
verses.kjv: Whosoever committeth sin transgresseth also the law: for sin is the transgression of the law.
verses.bsb: Everyone who practices sin practices lawlessness as well. Indeed, sin is lawlessness.

verses.esv: You know that he appeared in order to take away sins, and in him there is no sin.
verses.kjv: And ye know that he was manifested to take away our sins; and in him is no sin.
verses.bsb: But you know that Christ appeared to take away sins, and in Him there is no sin.

verses.esv: No one who abides in him keeps on sinning; no one who keeps on sinning has either seen him or known him.
verses.kjv: Whosoever abideth in him sinneth not: whosoever sinneth hath not seen him, neither known him.
verses.bsb: No one who remains in Him keeps on sinning. No one who continues to sin has seen Him or known Him.

verses.esv: Little children, let no one deceive you. Whoever practices righteousness is righteous, as he is righteous.
verses.kjv: Little children, let no man deceive you: he that doeth righteousness is righteous, even as he is righteous.
verses.bsb: Little children, let no one deceive you: The one who practices righteousness is righteous, just as Christ is righteous.

verses.esv: Whoever makes a practice of sinning is of the devil, for the devil has been sinning from the beginning. The reason the Son of God appeared was to destroy the works of the devil.
verses.kjv: He that committeth sin is of the devil; for the devil sinneth from the beginning. For this purpose the Son of God was manifested, that he might destroy the works of the devil.
verses.bsb: The one who practices sin is of the devil, because the devil has been sinning from the very start. This is why the Son of God was revealed, to destroy the works of the devil.

verses.esv: No one born of God makes a practice of sinning, for God's seed abides in him; and he cannot keep on sinning, because he has been born of God.
verses.kjv: Whosoever is born of God doth not commit sin; for his seed remaineth in him: and he cannot sin, because he is born of God.
verses.bsb: Anyone born of God refuses to practice sin, because God’s seed abides in him; he cannot go on sinning, because he has been born of God.

verses.esv: By this it is evident who are the children of God, and who are the children of the devil: whoever does not practice righteousness is not of God, nor is the one who does not love his brother.
verses.kjv: In this the children of God are manifest, and the children of the devil: whosoever doeth not righteousness is not of God, neither he that loveth not his brother.
verses.bsb: By this the children of God are distinguished from the children of the devil: Anyone who does not practice righteousness is not of God, nor is anyone who does not love his brother.

verses.esv: For this is the message that you have heard from the beginning, that we should love one another.
verses.kjv: For this is the message that ye heard from the beginning, that we should love one another.
verses.bsb: This is the message you have heard from the beginning: We should love one another.

verses.esv: We should not be like Cain, who was of the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did he murder him? Because his own deeds were evil and his brother's righteous.
verses.kjv: Not as Cain, who was of that wicked one, and slew his brother. And wherefore slew he him? Because his own works were evil, and his brother’s righteous.
verses.bsb: Do not be like Cain, who belonged to the evil one and murdered his brother. And why did Cain slay him? Because his own deeds were evil, while those of his brother were righteous.

verses.esv: Do not be surprised, brothers, that the world hates you.
verses.kjv: Marvel not, my brethren, if the world hate you.
verses.bsb: So do not be surprised, brothers, if the world hates you.

verses.esv: We know that we have passed out of death into life, because we love the brothers. Whoever does not love abides in death.
verses.kjv: We know that we have passed from death unto life, because we love the brethren. He that loveth not his brother abideth in death.
verses.bsb: We know that we have passed from death to life, because we love our brothers. The one who does not love remains in death.

verses.esv: Everyone who hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life abiding in him.
verses.kjv: Whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer: and ye know that no murderer hath eternal life abiding in him.
verses.bsb: Everyone who hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that eternal life does not reside in a murderer.

verses.esv: By this we know love, that he laid down his life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for the brothers.
verses.kjv: Hereby perceive we the love of God, because he laid down his life for us: and we ought to lay down our lives for the brethren.
verses.bsb: By this we know what love is: Jesus laid down His life for us, and we ought to lay down our lives for our brothers.

verses.esv: But if anyone has the world's goods and sees his brother in need, yet closes his heart against him, how does God's love abide in him?
verses.kjv: But whoso hath this world’s good, and seeth his brother have need, and shutteth up his bowels of compassion from him, how dwelleth the love of God in him?
verses.bsb: If anyone with earthly possessions sees his brother in need, but withholds his compassion from him, how can the love of God abide in him?

verses.esv: Little children, let us not love in word or talk but in deed and in truth.
verses.kjv: My little children, let us not love in word, neither in tongue; but in deed and in truth.
verses.bsb: Little children, let us love not in word and speech, but in action and truth.

verses.esv: By this we shall know that we are of the truth and reassure our heart before him;
verses.kjv: And hereby we know that we are of the truth, and shall assure our hearts before him.
verses.bsb: And by this we will know that we belong to the truth, and will assure our hearts in His presence:

verses.esv: for whenever our heart condemns us, God is greater than our heart, and he knows everything.
verses.kjv: For if our heart condemn us, God is greater than our heart, and knoweth all things.
verses.bsb: Even if our hearts condemn us, God is greater than our hearts, and He knows all things.

verses.esv: Beloved, if our heart does not condemn us, we have confidence before God;
verses.kjv: Beloved, if our heart condemn us not, then have we confidence toward God.
verses.bsb: Beloved, if our hearts do not condemn us, we have confidence before God,

verses.esv: and whatever we ask we receive from him, because we keep his commandments and do what pleases him.
verses.kjv: And whatsoever we ask, we receive of him, because we keep his commandments, and do those things that are pleasing in his sight.
verses.bsb: and we will receive from Him whatever we ask, because we keep His commandments and do what is pleasing in His sight.

verses.esv: And this is his commandment, that we believe in the name of his Son Jesus Christ and love one another, just as he has commanded us.
verses.kjv: And this is his commandment, That we should believe on the name of his Son Jesus Christ, and love one another, as he gave us commandment.
verses.bsb: And this is His commandment: that we should believe in the name of His Son, Jesus Christ, and we should love one another just as He commanded us.

verses.esv: Whoever keeps his commandments abides in God, and God in him. And by this we know that he abides in us, by the Spirit whom he has given us.
verses.kjv: And he that keepeth his commandments dwelleth in him, and he in him. And hereby we know that he abideth in us, by the Spirit which he hath given us.
verses.bsb: Whoever keeps His commandments remains in God, and God in him. And by this we know that He remains in us: by the Spirit He has given us.

verses.esv: Beloved, do not believe every spirit, but test the spirits to see whether they are from God, for many false prophets have gone out into the world.
verses.kjv: BELOVED, believe not every spirit, but try the spirits whether they are of God: because many false prophets are gone out into the world.
verses.bsb: Beloved, do not believe every spirit, but test the spirits to see whether they are from God. For many false prophets have gone out into the world.

verses.esv: By this you know the Spirit of God: every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is from God,
verses.kjv: Hereby know ye the Spirit of God: Every spirit that confesseth that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is of God:
verses.bsb: By this you will know the Spirit of God: Every spirit that confesses that Jesus Christ has come in the flesh is from God,

verses.esv: and every spirit that does not confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you heard was coming and now is in the world already.
verses.kjv: And every spirit that confesseth not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is not of God: and this is that spirit of antichrist, whereof ye have heard that it should come; and even now already is it in the world.
verses.bsb: and every spirit that does not confess Jesus is not from God. This is the spirit of the antichrist, which you have heard is coming and which is already in the world at this time.

verses.esv: Little children, you are from God and have overcome them, for he who is in you is greater than he who is in the world.
verses.kjv: Ye are of God, little children, and have overcome them: because greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world.
verses.bsb: You, little children, are from God and have overcome them, because greater is He who is in you than he who is in the world.

verses.esv: They are from the world; therefore they speak from the world, and the world listens to them.
verses.kjv: They are of the world: therefore speak they of the world, and the world heareth them.
verses.bsb: They are of the world. That is why they speak from the world’s perspective, and the world listens to them.

verses.esv: We are from God. Whoever knows God listens to us; whoever is not from God does not listen to us. By this we know the Spirit of truth and the spirit of error.
verses.kjv: We are of God: he that knoweth God heareth us; he that is not of God heareth not us. Hereby know we the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error.
verses.bsb: We are from God. Whoever knows God listens to us; whoever is not from God does not listen to us. That is how we know the Spirit of truth and the spirit of deception.

verses.esv: Beloved, let us love one another, for love is from God, and whoever loves has been born of God and knows God.
verses.kjv: Beloved, let us love one another: for love is of God; and every one that loveth is born of God, and knoweth God.
verses.bsb: Beloved, let us love one another, because love comes from God. Everyone who loves has been born of God and knows God.

verses.esv: Anyone who does not love does not know God, because God is love.
verses.kjv: He that loveth not knoweth not God; for God is love.
verses.bsb: Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love.

verses.esv: In this the love of God was made manifest among us, that God sent his only Son into the world, so that we might live through him.
verses.kjv: In this was manifested the love of God toward us, because that God sent his only begotten Son into the world, that we might live through him.
verses.bsb: This is how God’s love was revealed among us: God sent His one and only Son into the world, so that we might live through Him.

verses.esv: In this is love, not that we have loved God but that he loved us and sent his Son to be the propitiation for our sins.
verses.kjv: Herein is love, not that we loved God, but that he loved us, and sent his Son to be the propitiation for our sins.
verses.bsb: And love consists in this: not that we loved God, but that He loved us and sent His Son as the atoning sacrifice for our sins.

verses.esv: Beloved, if God so loved us, we also ought to love one another.
verses.kjv: Beloved, if God so loved us, we ought also to love one another.
verses.bsb: Beloved, if God so loved us, we also ought to love one another.

verses.esv: No one has ever seen God; if we love one another, God abides in us and his love is perfected in us.
verses.kjv: No man hath seen God at any time. If we love one another, God dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us.
verses.bsb: No one has ever seen God; but if we love one another, God remains in us, and His love is perfected in us.

verses.esv: By this we know that we abide in him and he in us, because he has given us of his Spirit.
verses.kjv: Hereby know we that we dwell in him, and he in us, because he hath given us of his Spirit.
verses.bsb: By this we know that we remain in Him, and He in us: He has given us of His Spirit.

verses.esv: And we have seen and testify that the Father has sent his Son to be the Savior of the world.
verses.kjv: And we have seen and do testify that the Father sent the Son to be the Saviour of the world.
verses.bsb: And we have seen and testify that the Father has sent His Son to be the Savior of the world.

verses.esv: Whoever confesses that Jesus is the Son of God, God abides in him, and he in God.
verses.kjv: Whosoever shall confess that Jesus is the Son of God, God dwelleth in him, and he in God.
verses.bsb: If anyone confesses that Jesus is the Son of God, God abides in him, and he in God.

verses.esv: So we have come to know and to believe the love that God has for us. God is love, and whoever abides in love abides in God, and God abides in him.
verses.kjv: And we have known and believed the love that God hath to us. God is love; and he that dwelleth in love dwelleth in God, and God in him.
verses.bsb: And we have come to know and believe the love that God has for us. God is love; whoever abides in love abides in God, and God in him.

verses.esv: By this is love perfected with us, so that we may have confidence for the day of judgment, because as he is so also are we in this world.
verses.kjv: Herein is our love made perfect, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment: because as he is, so are we in this world.
verses.bsb: In this way, love has been perfected among us, so that we may have confidence on the day of judgment; for in this world we are just like Him.

verses.esv: There is no fear in love, but perfect love casts out fear. For fear has to do with punishment, and whoever fears has not been perfected in love.
verses.kjv: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casteth out fear: because fear hath torment. He that feareth is not made perfect in love.
verses.bsb: There is no fear in love, but perfect love drives out fear, because fear involves punishment. The one who fears has not been perfected in love.

verses.esv: We love because he first loved us.
verses.kjv: We love him, because he first loved us.
verses.bsb: We love because He first loved us.

verses.esv: If anyone says, “I love God,” and hates his brother, he is a liar; for he who does not love his brother whom he has seen cannot love God whom he has not seen.
verses.kjv: If a man say, I love God, and hateth his brother, he is a liar: for he that loveth not his brother whom he hath seen, how can he love God whom he hath not seen?
verses.bsb: If anyone says, “I love God,” but hates his brother, he is a liar. For anyone who does not love his brother, whom he has seen, cannot love God, whom he has not seen.

verses.esv: And this commandment we have from him: whoever loves God must also love his brother.
verses.kjv: And this commandment have we from him, That he who loveth God love his brother also.
verses.bsb: And we have this commandment from Him: Whoever loves God must love his brother as well.

verses.esv: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God, and everyone who loves the Father loves whoever has been born of him.
verses.kjv: WHOSOEVER believeth that Jesus is the Christ is born of God: and every one that loveth him that begat loveth him also that is begotten of him.
verses.bsb: Everyone who believes that Jesus is the Christ has been born of God, and everyone who loves the Father also loves those born of Him.

verses.esv: By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God and obey his commandments.
verses.kjv: By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God, and keep his commandments.
verses.bsb: By this we know that we love the children of God: when we love God and keep His commandments.

verses.esv: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments. And his commandments are not burdensome.
verses.kjv: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments: and his commandments are not grievous.
verses.bsb: For this is the love of God, that we keep His commandments. And His commandments are not burdensome,

verses.esv: For everyone who has been born of God overcomes the world. And this is the victory that has overcome the world—our faith.
verses.kjv: For whatsoever is born of God overcometh the world: and this is the victory that overcometh the world, even our faith.
verses.bsb: because everyone born of God overcomes the world. And this is the victory that has overcome the world: our faith.

verses.esv: Who is it that overcomes the world except the one who believes that Jesus is the Son of God?
verses.kjv: Who is he that overcometh the world, but he that believeth that Jesus is the Son of God?
verses.bsb: Who then overcomes the world? Only he who believes that Jesus is the Son of God.

verses.esv: This is he who came by water and blood—Jesus Christ; not by the water only but by the water and the blood. And the Spirit is the one who testifies, because the Spirit is the truth.
verses.kjv: This is he that came by water and blood, even Jesus Christ; not by water only, but by water and blood. And it is the Spirit that beareth witness, because the Spirit is truth.
verses.bsb: This is the One who came by water and blood, Jesus Christ—not by water alone, but by water and blood. And it is the Spirit who testifies to this, because the Spirit is the truth.

verses.esv: For there are three that testify:
verses.kjv: For there are three that bear record in heaven, the Father, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are one.
verses.bsb: For there are three that testify:

verses.esv: the Spirit and the water and the blood; and these three agree.
verses.kjv: And there are three that bear witness in earth, the spirit, and the water, and the blood: and these three agree in one.
verses.bsb: the Spirit, the water, and the blood—and these three are in agreement.

verses.esv: If we receive the testimony of men, the testimony of God is greater, for this is the testimony of God that he has borne concerning his Son.
verses.kjv: If we receive the witness of men, the witness of God is greater: for this is the witness of God which he hath testified of his Son.
verses.bsb: Even if we accept human testimony, the testimony of God is greater. For this is the testimony that God has given about His Son.

verses.esv: Whoever believes in the Son of God has the testimony in himself. Whoever does not believe God has made him a liar, because he has not believed in the testimony that God has borne concerning his Son.
verses.kjv: He that believeth on the Son of God hath the witness in himself: he that believeth not God hath made him a liar; because he believeth not the record that God gave of his Son.
verses.bsb: Whoever believes in the Son of God has this testimony within him; whoever does not believe God has made Him out to be a liar, because he has not believed in the testimony that God has given about His Son.

verses.esv: And this is the testimony, that God gave us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.
verses.kjv: And this is the record, that God hath given to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.
verses.bsb: And this is that testimony: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in His Son.

verses.esv: Whoever has the Son has life; whoever does not have the Son of God does not have life.
verses.kjv: He that hath the Son hath life; and he that hath not the Son of God hath not life.
verses.bsb: Whoever has the Son has life; whoever does not have the Son of God does not have life.

verses.esv: I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, that you may know that you have eternal life.
verses.kjv: These things have I written unto you that believe on the name of the Son of God; that ye may know that ye have eternal life, and that ye may believe on the name of the Son of God.
verses.bsb: I have written these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God, so that you may know that you have eternal life.

verses.esv: And this is the confidence that we have toward him, that if we ask anything according to his will he hears us.
verses.kjv: And this is the confidence that we have in him, that, if we ask any thing according to his will, he heareth us:
verses.bsb: And this is the confidence that we have before Him: If we ask anything according to His will, He hears us.

verses.esv: And if we know that he hears us in whatever we ask, we know that we have the requests that we have asked of him.
verses.kjv: And if we know that he hear us, whatsoever we ask, we know that we have the petitions that we desired of him.
verses.bsb: And if we know that He hears us in whatever we ask, we know that we already possess what we have asked of Him.

verses.esv: If anyone sees his brother committing a sin not leading to death, he shall ask, and God will give him life—to those who commit sins that do not lead to death. There is sin that leads to death; I do not say that one should pray for that.
verses.kjv: If any man see his brother sin a sin which is not unto death, he shall ask, and he shall give him life for them that sin not unto death. There is a sin unto death: I do not say that he shall pray for it.
verses.bsb: If anyone sees his brother committing a sin not leading to death, he should ask God, who will give life to those who commit this kind of sin. There is a sin that leads to death; I am not saying he should ask regarding that sin.

verses.esv: All wrongdoing is sin, but there is sin that does not lead to death.
verses.kjv: All unrighteousness is sin: and there is a sin not unto death.
verses.bsb: All unrighteousness is sin, yet there is sin that does not lead to death.

verses.esv: We know that everyone who has been born of God does not keep on sinning, but he who was born of God protects him, and the evil one does not touch him.
verses.kjv: We know that whosoever is born of God sinneth not; but he that is begotten of God keepeth himself, and that wicked one toucheth him not.
verses.bsb: We know that anyone born of God does not keep on sinning; the One who was born of God protects him, and the evil one cannot touch him.

verses.esv: We know that we are from God, and the whole world lies in the power of the evil one.
verses.kjv: And we know that we are of God, and the whole world lieth in wickedness.
verses.bsb: We know that we are of God, and that the whole world is under the power of the evil one.

verses.esv: And we know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding, so that we may know him who is true; and we are in him who is true, in his Son Jesus Christ. He is the true God and eternal life.
verses.kjv: And we know that the Son of God is come, and hath given us an understanding, that we may know him that is true, and we are in him that is true, even in his Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and eternal life.
verses.bsb: And we know that the Son of God has come and has given us understanding, so that we may know Him who is true; and we are in Him who is true—in His Son Jesus Christ. He is the true God and eternal life.

verses.esv: Little children, keep yourselves from idols.
verses.kjv: Little children, keep yourselves from idols. Amen.
verses.bsb: Little children, keep yourselves from idols.
